featureSlug.description: Short kebab-case identifier for the feature, e.g. 'pipeline-infra'

epicSpecPath.description: Absolute path to the tmp/docs epic spec file (gitignored working draft)

childSpecPaths.description: Ordered list of absolute paths to child issue spec files (tmp/docs/); children are created first, epic last

brainstormBriefPath.description: Absolute path to the gitignored tmp/docs/<featureSlug>-brief.md produced by the front-door brainstorm. The engine VALIDATES this file (exists + parses + carries the greppable 'uiFeature:' marker) at phase 1 and never conducts the brainstorm. It is NOT a prompt-fill arg — the driving skill's front-door brainstorm is its sole producer.

uiFeature.description: Optional override. The engine DERIVES this at phase 1 from the brief's greppable 'uiFeature: yes|no' marker; the arg lets a caller force it. Drives the conditional Figma design+review phases (3 & 4) and the Figma-Design-Verdict gate before fan-out.

model.description: Override model tier. Defaults: opus for review gates, sonnet for mechanical stages. Accepts 'opus' | 'sonnet' | a full model id.

runId.description: P5-engine-internal: identifies the run for SSE emission to the P2 server. Declared optional here so additionalProperties:false does not reject the args the engine passes.

dashboardBaseUrl.description: P5-engine-internal: base URL of the P2 status server (default http://127.0.0.1:<P2 port>). Optional.

dryRun.description: P6-documented: when true, logs each phase decision without mutating GitHub state. Optional, default false.
